name: progressive disclosure: /help <unknown-topic> exits 2 and lists known topics (getting-started, first-week, reference, source-folders, threat-model, eslint-migration)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/help.sh" not-a-real-topic 2>out.txt && grep -E "Known topics" out.txt 1>&2 && grep -E "getting-started" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
